prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含原理科）最低位次分别为约19210名→22458名→21560名→21575名→22777名，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年达到近5年最高位次22777名；近5 年累计后移约3567名，2025年基准位次约22777名；该校在江西省物理类招生计划：2021年16人、2022年12人、2023年10人、2024年6人、2025年6人；2026年（§ 7）计划大幅扩招至15人，较2025年增加9人，增幅达150%，扩招幅度极大，竞争压力预计显著缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2025年第180 名、2026年第177名，排名稳中有升，属于体育类专门院校中的顶尖学府；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及排球联赛主场争议、校园管理舆情等事件，抖音 综合热度排名第18（高热），短视频曝光量较高但舆论偏负面，可能对报考热度产生一定抑制作用；学科评估数据中未收录北京体育大学A-及以上等级学科，该 校以体育学为核心特色，相关专业在体育类院校中具有独特优势。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校物理类招生专业以数据科学与大数据技术、新闻学、康复物理治疗、英语为主；计 算机/大数据类专业社会热度高热推荐，新闻传播类明显劝退；江西省2026年普通高考总人数约474900人，物理类按近年比例估算约267900人，较2025年266425人略有增加，竞争 小幅加剧；北京体育大学位于北京市，属一线城市高校，对江西考生有一定地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次22777名、2026年物理类计划大幅扩招150%（竞争显著缓解）、声誉偏负面（报考热度略降）、本省考生小幅增加（竞争略 加剧）等因素，扩招效应占绝对主导地位，预计2026年最低位次较2025年大幅后移；预测最低位次约42776名，区间42276–43276名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 19210 → 22458 → 21560 → 21575 → 22777, showing a fluctuating downward trend, reaching the highest ranking in the past 5 years at 22777 in 2025; the cumulative downward shift over the past 5 years is about 3567, with a baseline ranking of about 22777 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan in Jiangxi Province for Physics Category: 16 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 6 in 2024, 6 in 2025; in 2026 (§ 7), the plan significantly expands to 15, an increase of 9 compared to 2025, a growth rate of 150%, indicating a substantial expansion and expected significant relief in competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 180th in 2025 and 177th in 2026 in the Soft Science China University Rankings, showing a stable upward trend, and is a top institution among specialized sports universities; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving controversies such as the volleyball league home court dispute and campus management incidents; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 18th (high heat), with high short video exposure but negative public opinion, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm; no A- or above level disciplines are recorded in the discipline evaluation data for Beijing Sport University, with sports science as its core characteristic, and related majors have unique advantages among sports universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's Physics Category enrollment majors mainly include Data Science and Big Data Technology, Journalism, Rehabilitation Physical Therapy, and English; computer/big data majors are highly recommended with high social popularity, while journalism and communication majors are clearly discouraged; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Province general college entrance examination is about 474,900, with Physics Category estimated at about 267,900 based on recent proportions, a slight increase from 266,425 in 2025, leading to a slight intensification of competition; Beijing Sport University is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which has a certain regional appeal to Jiangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 22777 in 2025, a significant expansion of 150% in Physics Category enrollment in 2026 (significant relief in competition), a somewhat negative reputation (slightly reduced application enthusiasm), and a slight increase in local candidates (slightly intensified competition), the expansion effect is absolutely dominant, and it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly decrease compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 42776, with a range of 42276–43276.

Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 42276–43276 are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<42276) can focus on sprinting for popular majors such as Data Science and Big Data Technology.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) were approximately 2538 → 3019 → 3488 → 4041 → 3952, showing a continuous backward trend. The peak was 4041 in 2024, then slightly recovered to 3952 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1414 positions over the past 5 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3952. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangxi Province for History Category: 10 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 6 in 2024, 7 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 12, an increase of 5 from 2025, a growth of about 71.4%. The expansion is significant, and competition pressure is expected to ease noticeably.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 180th in 2025 and 177th in 2026, showing a steady rise. It is a top institution among specialized sports universities. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving controversies such as the volleyball league home court disputes and campus management incidents. Its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 18th (high heat), with high short video exposure but negative public opinion, which may somewhat suppress application enthusiasm. The discipline evaluation data does not include Beijing Sport University's A- or above disciplines. The university focuses on sports science as its core feature, and related majors have unique advantages among sports universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The History Category majors at this university include Journalism, Network and New Media, English, Marxist Theory, and Public Administration. The social popularity of Journalism and Communication majors shows a clear discouraging trend (2023), which may reduce the attractiveness of related majors. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Province general college entrance examination is about 474,900, with History Category estimated at about 207,000 based on recent proportions, a slight increase from 206,055 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Beijing Sport University is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which has some regional appeal to Jiangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3952, the significant 71.4% expansion in the 2026 History Category plan (easing competition), the slightly negative reputation (slightly reducing application enthusiasm), and the slight increase in local candidates (slightly intensifying competition), the expansion effect dominates. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5446, with a range of 4946–5946.
